title: Engagement State
description: The per-engagement body written by comp-suite and round-tripped through the engagement.* MCP tools. Single source of truth for the engagement-state contract; mirrors the server's EngagementBody Pydantic model 1:1 (v2-facade/src/tools/engagement_schemas.py). No field is paraphrased and no enum is extended or pruned relative to the server (charter INV-06). MIM-0041 P2; recreated in src/ during P3 after a build-plugin.sh rebuild wiped a plugin-only copy.

schema_version.description: Semver of the engagement-state schema, pinned via const: a document MUST carry exactly this version. This is the single source of truth for the schema version; bump this const AND the server's ENGAGEMENT_SCHEMA_VERSION together (versioned-artifact-changelog rule). The pattern documents the shape for a future maintainer who relaxes the const.

engagement_id.description: Stable engagement id: a fiscal-period (YYYY-Q[1-4]) or ISO-date (YYYY-MM-DD) prefix, then a lowercase-kebab slug. Matches the server ENGAGEMENT_ID_RE and the 0073 CHECK constraint.

org_slug.description: Advisory only (RD-4'). The real tenancy key is org_id (RLS); the DB column is nullable.

mode.description: The active skill/mode for this engagement (e.g. comp, advisor, comms, training, transformer). Free string server-side (not enum-constrained) — kept as-is to mirror EngagementBody.

budget_usd.description: Budget in USD as a Decimal-safe string or number (never a lossy float). Mirrors the server EngagementBody Decimal handling (INV-08).

industry_outsider.description: Optional note flagging an outsider-industry engagement.

working_artifacts.description: Paths or ids of working artifacts.

engagement_mode.description: Engagement-mode block (P2). Nullable; not enum-constrained server-side (mirrors EngagementBody and the 0073 nullable column).

state_shape_variant.description: Shape variant of the engagement state. Enum mirrors the server StateShapeVariant Literal (nullable).

pre_engagement_only.description: True when the engagement is pre-engagement only.

engagement_status.description: Close-state (P2). Nullable; not enum-constrained server-side (mirrors EngagementBody and the 0073 nullable column).

closed_date.description: Date the engagement was closed (set together with engagement_status).

closed_by.description: Who or what closed the engagement.

$comment: Changelog — 2.1.0 (P2 initial, recreated P3): first shipped engagement-state schema. Mirrors the server EngagementBody 1:1 — 5 required fields (schema_version, engagement_id, mode, started_at, last_active), the engagement-mode block (engagement_mode / state_shape_variant / pre_engagement_only) and the close-state block (engagement_status / closed_date / closed_by), the fields the 2026-06-30 audit found were silently dropped. additionalProperties:false. schema_version was const-pinned in P3 per adversarial-verify Cluster E (previously pattern-only — a convention, now machine-enforced). Lives in src/_core/schemas/ so build-plugin.sh ships it to plugin/; do not author it under plugin/ (that tree is rm -rf'd on every build).
